alternatives_considered.option: Proceed from research directly to CDR
alternatives_considered.reason_rejected: This loses explicit decision provenance and alternatives.

follow_up_actions: Use accepted decisions as CDR inputs.
negative: Requires explicit evidence and alternatives before later stages can proceed.
positive: Creates auditable decision provenance tied to normalized research evidence.

context: MPP needs a decision layer that converts normalized research into auditable architecture decisions before CDR and implementation.
decision: Adopt a DRS packet that requires status, context, decision, two alternatives, evidence bindings, consequences, and confidence.

evidence_bindings.supports: ADR-style records require evidence-bound context, alternatives, consequences, status, and confidence.

title: Use evidence-bound DRS decision records
